raw_title: Book Review: ‘Dog Days,’ by Emily LaBarge
description: In her ingenious “Dog Days,” Emily LaBarge writes about a terrifying event without resorting to “the trauma plot.”
Ali Smith’s new novel, “Glyph,” dispenses with subtleties and takes on an age of war and the ghosts left behind.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Keeper of My Kin,’ by Ada Ferrer
book_title: ‘Keeper of My Kin,’ by Ada Ferrer
description: A stirring memoir by the Pulitzer Prize-winning historian Ada Ferrer chronicles her family’s life in the aftermath of traumatic rupture.
